Cool."   [00:15]  "So, uh, longtime inner circle member, uh, I think if not one of the first, like I'd say like first five and used to sell, you guys remember those things on the back of your phones? They were like the little pop thing that, uh, like helped you hold your phone. You remember those? The little circles? They sold one. It's like a little rectangle and it's called the eye sling and uh, it's like their variation of that. They sold that [shit] on Amazon. I don't know how much money you made on that, but I'm sure it wasn't a ton."   [00:45]  "They've um, come a long way um to say the least. Multiple iterations to get to where they're at today. And it's uh quite an interesting story, but we'll we'll let him tell it. Um shortly we're going to do a little Q&A with somebody who made $6 million in a month. That's what this trophy is for."   [01:05]  📊 SLIDE/MOMENTO DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  Cerimônia de Troféu - $6 Million Month Achievement   NÚMEROS:  $6 million/mês, $5.5 million (recorde anterior), $6.7 million (valor específico)   VISUAL:  Troféu grande sendo apresentado, cerimônia formal, palco com apresentador e palestrante   [01:15]  "But uh first we got to bring them up. Xen, if you want to come up here, give Zen a big round of applause, guys. Thank you. Thank you. Hell yeah."   [01:25]  "So, let's do an official trophy ceremony here. Uh just so you know, all those who are new, who don't know, we obviously have a very obvious intention here in the inner circle, which is to get richer. And when you do and you hit milestones that are big and and worth hitting, we reward you with trophies."   [01:45]  📊 SISTEMA DE TROFÉUS DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  Sistema de Recompensas Inner Circle   NÚMEROS: $1 million/mês = troféu entry level $2 million/mês = troféu maior $5.5 million/mês = recorde anterior $6.7 million/mês = novo recorde $4,000 = custo de envio   VISUAL:  Hierarquia de troféus por tamanho, escala progressiva baseada em revenue mensal   [02:00]  "The more money that you make, the bigger the trophy is, the harder it will be to take home. Uh, you make a million a month, $4,000 in shipping to send it somewhere. Yeah. You make a million a month. That's our entry level trophy here in the group and we'll reward you no matter how you did it."   [02:20]  "Uh, you make 2 million a month, the trophy gets a little bigger. Sometimes it just changes color, give or take, what's available. There's not a lot of big trophies out there to buy, believe it or not. Long story short, this is the biggest trophy that we've given out to date here in the inner circle."   [02:35]  "Uh, this beats the previous record of $5 million a month. To be respectful of the previous winner, it was 5.5 million a month. This is 6.7 million a month to be specific. But we round down to six million here. Okay."   [02:50]  "So, without further ado, guys, let's give a big round of applause to... I don't even know if I'm ready. There we go. Look at that. Yeah. Pretty serious, right? Beautiful. Beautiful."   [03:10]  "Feel free to set it down. You know, it's quite heavy. Yeah. All right. We'll put it down right here. All right. Cool. Awesome. Yeah."   [03:20]  "So, we we'll do a short Q&A. Xan, if you want to say anything first, feel free. And uh guys, we'll just go as long as you got questions."   [03:30]  "Yeah, absolutely. What's up, everybody? Um, so first of all, you know, to be honest, all of you can achieve this if you work really hard and follow what Jeremy's told you because what he says does work. um you just have to work really hard and make sure that you apply yourself and continue to upgrade your personality and like the things you talked about earlier about stepping into excess to be honest."   [03:55]  📊 REALIDADE FINANCEIRA DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Perspectiva sobre $6 Million/Mês"   NÚMEROS: $6 million/mês alcançado em Março 2023 $1.5-2 million/mês = operação atual $10 million/mês = meta para o ano $40 million = classificação de "small business" $6 million/semana = gastos de players maiores   VISUAL:  Comparação de escalas de negócio, hierarquia de revenue, perspectiva de mercado   [04:00]  "So, you know, obviously the high has has dropped. We we reached this milestone in March of 2023. Uh and now we're doing about 1.5 to 2 million a month uh across both of our businesses and we're trying to take that to 10 million a month this year uh God willing."   [04:20]  "I'll also say that honestly like to the every layman and to the everyday person 6 million a month is a lot of money but unfortunately as you as you level up you realize that it's really not a lot of money. Um and there's people who spend 6 million a week right there's people who spend 6 million every 3 days."   [04:40]  "So it's also just to note that this is it's awesome and I'm I'm grateful for it. But to realize that there's there's really levels to this [shit] you know. Um Hudson's in Dubai right now. He's meeting with some investors. I wasn't able to go. you know, we're we're talking with people who, you know, they'll throw 20 million around just cuz, right, um this next bull market, they're planning on making billions."   [05:05]  📊 CLASSIFICAÇÃO DE NEGÓCIOS DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Definição de Small Business vs Enterprise"   NÚMEROS: Abaixo de $40 million = small business $1 million/hora = padrão de bilionários mencionado $4 million/semana = exemplo de mentor bilionário   VISUAL:  Escala hierárquica de classificação empresarial, comparação de magnitude financeira   [05:10]  "So, you know, I would just recommend all of you, right, to realize that there's a lot bigger of a game in business. 6 million a month really isn't [shit] You know, to be honest, you're not even considered or classified uh beyond a small business until after 40 million, I think. So, think about that, right? If you're not making 40 million, you're a small business."   [05:30]  "So, just to realize, you know, I'm grateful for it and it's amazing, but at the same time to just really really anchor in the fact that it's not [shit] And I want all of you to realize that because when you get there, you'll realize that there's people playing on such like way bigger levels."   [05:45]  "I remember you had a mentor that you were speaking with, billionaire, right? And he's like, if I can't make a million an hour or something, right? Yeah. And he's making whatever it is, four million a week or whatever. So, um, yeah, just realizing that the game keeps going and and growing and you can really achieve this number with really any type of business, but it's about the level at which you want to grow at. So, that's all I got."   [06:10]  "Well, break it down for us. So, what did you do to actually hit the 6 million in a month in terms of revenue? How was this split?"   [06:20]  📊 BREAKDOWN DO $6M DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Estrutura de Revenue - Março 2023"   NÚMEROS: $6 million total $5 million em Março $1 million em Abril (runoff) 250K = coleção inicial NFT 80x = multiplicador de crescimento 4,000 pessoas = audiência do lançamento Top 25 = ranking mundial de empresas NFT   VISUAL:  Divisão de revenue por fonte, timeline de vendas, estrutura de duas empresas paralelas   [06:25]  "Yeah, absolutely. So, we did in March of 2023, uh, and we'll we'll kind of explain how we did it. So, uh, one of our businesses is in the web 3 space. It's an NFT company or a blockchain company called Steady Stack. We're one of the top 25 NFT companies in the world."   [06:45]  "And actually, we just got brought on uh as Forbes web 3 advisers. So for all of Forbes web 3, where they're advisers now, and they've actually pretty soon here, you guys will see us on the top 50 web 3 entrepreneurs uh on Forbes, which is really awesome."   [07:00]  📊 ESTRATÉGIA NFT DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Modelo de Lançamento NFT - Steady Stack"   NÚMEROS: Coleção inicial: 250K Crescimento: 80x em bear market Mint grande: $5 million (Março) Runoff: $1 million (Abril) Royalties atuais: centenas de milhares/mês   VISUAL:  Funil de lançamento NFT em duas fases, prova de conceito seguida de escala, estrutura de royalties recorrentes   [07:05]  "And so basically, we took our current web 2 offer, which was Steady Stack, as a trading program and an ecosystem, and we turned it into an NFT. We still sell it as a program, but we launched it um to about 4,000 people. And our initial collection was only 250K."   [07:25]  "We saw an 80x increase from the initial minting of that asset or of that NFT. Uh and so we got a lot of uh people interested. They were really excited. Obviously, seeing an 80x growth in a bare market is pretty insane."   [07:40]  "And then uh what we did afterwards is we did a larger mint, which was the game plan the whole time. Show the proof of concept and then do a bigger one. And that's where we made uh $6 million uh total. We made five million in the month of March and then a million in April. Uh just kind of the runoff sales of whatever that was left over."   [08:00]  📊 BUSINESS MODEL DUAL DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Estrutura de Duas Empresas"   NÚMEROS: Web3 (NFT): centenas de milhares/mês em royalties Web2 (Crypto Mining): $900K-1.2M/mês atual Investimento: $4 million em infraestrutura Meta: $10 million/mês   VISUAL:  Modelo de negócio duplo, fluxos de receita paralelos, investimento de capital em ativos físicos   [08:05]  "And uh so that that was the majority of the 6 million was 5 million done through our NFT sale. Um which it's a little bit different, right? With an NFT sale, it's a kind of a one-time thing. You sell and then you make the royalties. So now we're only making a few hundred,000 a month on the on the web 3 side and we're planning to build other products and services um to increase that."   [08:30]  "And then also on the web two side on our on our kind of more, you know, internet marketing type businesses, we have our crypto mining offer that has been doing really well. We've been really quiet about it for all of 2023 because we wanted to get ahead, uh, significantly ahead before any of the other competitors in the market could see what we were doing."   [08:50]  "So, we invested $4 million of our cash into building that crypto mining facility. Uh, and now we're looking to take that to 10 million a month. Right now, we're doing around like 900 to 1.2 million a month on that. Um Sean's actually helping us scale that. So we better hit 10 million, buddy. Uh but anyway, so that that that's basically uh how we did it. That was the breakdown."   [09:15]  "Nice. All right. Well, what questions do you guys got? Feel free to raise your hand." So, one of the things that I've been doing really to improve myself is I've been really learning from as many billionaires in person and not in person as possible to just try and understand their thinking. And one of the number one things they say is just to if you want things in your life to change, you need to change things in your life. Exactly what Jeremy was saying a little bit earlier about moving into excess, right?"   [10:00]  📊 ALOCAÇÃO DE CAPITAL DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Estratégia de Reinvestimento vs Gastos Pessoais"   NÚMEROS: $100,000 = relógio AP (comprado após $6M) $500K/mês = ponto de estagnação comum $200K/mês = outro ponto de estagnação   VISUAL:  Comparação entre gastos pessoais e reinvestimento empresarial, timing de recompensas pessoais, ciclo de crescimento vs estagnação   [10:05]  "So, for example, like if one of the things that kept me always kind of stagnant in business is I realized that a lot of us will make a bunch of money, but then we'll start spending a lot of money as well on things that maybe don't push us further. Um, now of course you should spend money on things that are going to increase your character, dress better, you know, buy a nice car, whatever, whatever."   [10:30]  "But I realized that I wasn't directing that capital back into fueling the growth of my company and the growth of my people and also pouring into my people as a leader. So those are the two major things that I noticed that a lot of people that are a lot richer than me are doing."   [10:45]  "you know, there's people who are making tens of millions a month and they're not even, you know, the way that they're using their capital is a lot more intelligent than a lot of us in this room, right? Um, you know, I might be wearing, you know, $100,000 AP, but, you know, that was only after I made $6 million in a month, right?"   [11:05]  📊 ESTRATÉGIA DE ATIVOS DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Compra de Ativos Empresariais"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente nesta seção   VISUAL:  Infraestrutura de crypto mining, warehouse spaces, relacionamentos diplomáticos internacionais, rede de distribuição global   [11:10]  "And so, the way that I was stewarding and allocating my capital, I feel like got a lot better. So, now I'm constantly trying to buy more assets inside of my business. Right? Now, you know, obviously we have our crypto mining franchise. I'm buying as much uh warehouse space and building uh electrical infrastructure and building relationships with diplomats and all parts of different uh different parts of the world because I realized that if I reinvest my money into my business, it's going to grow, right?"   [11:40]  📊 PRINCÍPIO DE CRESCIMENTO DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Growing or Dying - Não Existe Estagnação"   NÚMEROS: $500K/mês = estagnação exemplo 1 $200K/mês = estagnação exemplo 2   VISUAL:  Conceito binário de crescimento vs morte empresarial, perda de valor ao longo do tempo na estagnação   [11:45]  "A lot of people, you'll meet them and they're stuck at 500 grand a month forever or 200 grand a month forever and then you look at their life and they're not pouring that money back into their business. They kind of just, okay, cool. I got this thing. It's making money. But unfortunately, what a lot of people don't realize is that you're not you're either growing or dying, right? So if you stay stuck, you're actually losing money over time."   [12:10]  📊 ESTRATÉGIA DE LIDERANÇA DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Sistema de Desenvolvimento de Equipe"   NÚMEROS: 2x por semana (Segunda e Quarta) 1 hora por sessão Ano: 2023 (início do programa)   VISUAL:  Calls estruturadas de treinamento, inclusão de time + contractors + clientes, desenvolvimento cultural organizacional   [12:15]  "So that's that's the main thing in terms of how I was using my money. And then second was again leadership, right? So in 2023, I started doing Monday and Wednesday 1-hour long calls for my entire team. And then also anybody tangentially included with us."   [12:35]  "So right now we work with Sean's company, Venture Suite. We have his staff come to those meetings and things like that. So anybody, any of our contractors, anybody that we work with, even some clients, um, we started doing those leadership trainings on really upgrading the mentality of our people because at the end of the day, this result, it's amazing, but I can't say I produced this result."   [12:55]  "Husting can't say he produced this result. We did it because of our team, right? So it's about pouring into your people and leveling them up and improving them. And uh, those were the two major things. But the core of that piece that you mentioned is if you're not growing, it just means that something's got to change, you know? So..." So, like 600 7 a.m. That was another thing, right? I was always a kind of a late riser and and and go to bed late. Now, I go to bed late and wake up early. so I don't sleep. But um waking up early has been really huge."   [13:45]  "I think that that is super valuable because you just get time to kind of Nobody's awake. Nobody's doing anything but you're awake. You have time kind of alone to do whatever. Um dude, it's simple, dude. It's not about how you structure your day to be honest that's going to produce results. It's about what you do with your time when you have time, right?" I'm constantly listening to podcasts and things like that." You know, I'm constantly programming my mind because honestly everything that I'm doing, Jeremy talks about. It's just about doing it, right?" The the data that's coming into your senses, right? And if you can control that data, it ends up programming you for success. So doing those things, right?"   [15:20]  "Like the average person is going to go and listen to music, but somebody who's who's above average or exceptional, they might be listening to a podcast and then a little bit of a music and then they'll go read books and then they'll listen to an audio book and then they'll go listen to a podcast and that kind of stuff." I enjoy like reading books and listening to podcasts and audios and trainings and like, you know, The Strangest Secret Napoleon Hill stuff. I really enjoy that stuff now." I can text it over in the group if you guys missed that."   [16:25]  "But I'm always trying to improve myself on every element, right? So my hope is that every time somebody you guys see me every quarter, I'm going to be stronger, smarter, more spiritually sound, more emotionally stable, better character, making more money, everything. I want to be on a on that consistent upward spiral."   [16:45]  "You know, last year we picked up a two million a month award. This this time we picked up six. Next time it'll be 12, right? because we want to constantly be iterating and improving and growing and getting better again and again. Um, so with my free time, that's usually what I'm doing, just trying to get better, get smarter. Um, yeah. Sean..." Yeah. So, I mean, when you really start tapping into the larger numbers, you realize that again, $6 million ain't [shit] Like honestly, $6 million is such an insignificant amount of money to somebody who's actually a real player in the game of business."   [17:35]  "You can really start to feel this when you play around real estate people. Uh because obviously real estate is a big game, especially commercial real estate. It's a big game. There's people who are moving 400 million to buy a property. You know what I'm saying? One of these skyrises in New York, sorry, Miami or New York or wherever billions, right?"   [17:55]  "And there's, you guys got to think about this. There's a group of guys that sat in a room. They said, 'Okay, we need 1.2 billion from the bank. we're going to go buy this building or we're going to go build the building and then we're going to do this, this, and this and we're going to make 40 million a month in cash flow, right? So, that's real [shit] There's someone really actually doing that in the world. And they're doing it consistently."   [18:20]  📊 PADRÃO DE ESTAGNAÇÃO DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Por Que Internet Marketers Ficam Presos"   NÚMEROS: $20-30 million = ponto de estagnação comum 95% = taxa de falha em NFTs   VISUAL:  Teto de crescimento de internet marketers, recusa em evoluir para jogos maiores, zona de conforto financeira   [18:25]  "And so realizing that again, h how you're using that capital is going to completely change your financial future forever. So, you know, some people that I feel like have stopped growing, I know a lot of internet marketers, honestly at this point, I've probably met every single one that's important."   [18:45]  "Uh, and all almost all of them they get stuck. They they reach 20 million, 30 million, whatever, and then they're just stuck. They have a lot of cash, but they're stuck. And the reason is because they didn't want to upgrade the game, Sean, which is what you're talking about, the bigger money games, right? They didn't want to upgrade the game."   [19:05]  📊 ESTRATÉGIA NFT AVANÇADA DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Entrada em Mercado Nascente - Web3/NFT"   NÚMEROS: $5 million = do NFT mint $1.7 million adicional 95% = taxa de falha/scam no espaço Top 25 = ranking mundial alcançado   VISUAL:  Mercado nascente com alta taxa de falha, oportunidade para quem entende negócios + tecnologia, casos de FTC contra grandes nomes   [19:10]  "So, for example, we got into a space- for for for the 5 million that we made in that month plus the 1.7, but the five was from an NFT, right? What did we do? We emerge into a nent space where nobody else knows what the [fuck] they're doing. Most people are going to fail. 95% of people are going to fail and be scammers and rugpull their project and ruin a lot of people's lives, all that kind of stuff."   [19:35]  📊 CASOS DE MERCADO DETECTADOS ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Exemplos de Problemas Legais em NFTs"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente   VISUAL:  Casos de figuras conhecidas: Tom Billy (FTC judgment), Gary Vee (quase problemas), Tai Lopez (problemas legais)   [19:40]  "Even, you know, if you guys know who Tom Billy is, he got FTC judgment for his NFT raise. Gary Vee almost got screwed for his NFT raise. Tai Lopez got [fuck] dick slapped for his NFT raise. So, it's about looking at the larger games and executing well."   [20:00]  📊 VANTAGEM COMPETITIVA DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Nerds Técnicos vs Business People"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente   VISUAL:  Gap entre habilidade técnica e habilidade de negócios, oportunidade para quem tem ambas, criação de valor real + tecnologia   [20:05]  "So, you know, when you look at such a nent space like NFTTS, if we get to the top of it, which is really not that hard because these guys, the the [fuck] you know, turboest nerds that are doing the NFTs that know how to code and program, but don't know how to talk to people, they're not good good at business at all."   [20:25]  "So, they can build something and utilize this technology, but it's essentially valueless. So, we said, 'Okay, we're going to create value and use it with the technology because we understand it.' And now we get to tap into all kinds of money."   [20:40]  📊 NETWORK EFFECT DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Parcerias Estratégicas Web3"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente   VISUAL:  Rede de grandes players: Board Ape, Anamoka, Kraken, Binance, Coinbase, market makers de Bitcoin/Ethereum   [20:45]  "like we're constantly brought up in in in conversations with people like Board Ape or Anamoka, you know. Um we we're doing a deal with Kraken right now, doing a deal with Binance. We're doing, you know, we're meeting with Coinbase pretty soon. We're working with investors and people who literally market make for for Bitcoin and Ethereum. Like literally like we're talking billions and billions and billions of dollars."   [21:10]  📊 ESTRATÉGIA CRYPTO MINING DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Deals de Capital Institucional"   NÚMEROS: $10 million = deal 1 $1 million/mês = deployment $30 million = deal 2 (cliente) $40 million = capital total já alocado Bilhões = valuation de empresas públicas de crypto mining   VISUAL:  Estrutura de deals de alto valor, capital institucional entrando, comparação com empresas públicas do setor   [21:15]  "And again, it's about because we took the cash that we were making and we got into a bigger game. Same thing with crypto mining. So, we just did a deal for $10 million. This person is deploying a million a month and uh this is they're just going to this is the beginning. We have another client deploying $30 million."   [21:35]  "So, between those two, we have $40 million in capital already allocated to our offer that's coming in. And it's just a different game. If you go look at any of the publicly traded crypto mining companies out there, they're worth billions, right?"   [21:50]  📊 PRINCÍPIO DE INVESTIMENTO DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Investimento Inicial Para Jogar Jogo Maior"   NÚMEROS: $3-4 million = investimento inicial em mining $10 million = deals que pode fechar agora $30 million = deals maiores acessíveis PI (Private Investigator) = due diligence de investidores   VISUAL:  Necessidade de investimento de capital para credibilidade, investigação profunda de background por investidores, escala de confiança   [21:55]  "So, it's about like if I never took that 34 million and put it into the crypto mining site that I did, I never would have been able to play at the bigger game where I can go tell somebody pay me 10 million, right? or you're gonna pay me 30 million."   [22:15]  "I had a the people who were going to put 30 million in with me, they [fuck] hired a PI to like stalk me basically to like make sure that I'm good for it, you know, and that I'm not, you know, they don't have to ruin my life if things go wrong."   [22:30]  📊 EXEMPLOS DE EVOLUÇÃO DETECTADOS ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Casos de Upgrade de Jogo"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente   VISUAL:  Trajetórias de sucesso: Becker (software), Hormozi (portfolio + exit), Tai Lopez (e-commerce funds)   [22:35]  "So, um, that being said, right, it's just about leveling up into that next game, right? Like a lot of the people that you see that are operating at those higher levels, they just they they ushered into into that next game. Becker, he ushered into software, right? Hermoszi ushered into the portfolio and then you know combined everything and exited. Tai ushered into you know building those e-commerce funds and things like that and so on and so forth."   [23:00]  📊 FRAMEWORK DE WHOLESALING DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Lucro no Movimento de Capital"   NÚMEROS: $10 million = preço de compra (exemplo) $12 million = preço de venda $2 million = lucro na transação Centenas de milhões/mês = potencial de crypto mining   VISUAL:  Modelo de arbitragem em real estate comercial, lucro na facilitação de movimento de capital, escala de transações   [23:05]  "So that that's what I would say right um is is that the importance of taking that cash and getting into that next game is really what's going to to level you up. And then the last piece of advice that I would say that really helped us make a lot more money and why we're gearing up to make 10 million a month."   [23:25]  "And then I honestly I genuinely believe our crypto mining offer can do hundreds of millions a month is I I learned this from a buddy of mine and I you know if he ever watches this he's going to know I'm talking about him but he's a real estate wholesaler. Okay? He he wholesales commercial real estate and he was making a ton of money. I mean he made a lot of money last year."   [23:50]  "And as I was talking to him in early 2023, I realized I was like, look, where is his where is he making money in the movement of a lot of money, right? In the movement of that capital and then taking a piece of it, right? So he's he's in deals where he's he's getting a piece of property for 10 million and selling it for 12, making 2 million on the sale, right?"   [24:15]  📊 FILOSOFIA DE ESCALA DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Tempo Igual, Números Diferentes"   NÚMEROS: Mesmo tempo para fazer $1 billion vs $1 million $100,000/mês = mínimo de Jeremy para clientes   VISUAL:  Conceito de tempo constante mas magnitude variável, escolha de problemas determina escala de resultados   [24:20]  "So you got to ask yourself like what's the level at which what are the numbers that you're playing with? because that's when you're really going to realize the the impact of what you're doing. And remember, it takes the same amount of time to make a billion dollars that it does to make a million. It really does. It's just about what you work on, what you do, what are the numbers you're playing, what what are the problems you're solving, because that's that's really the biggest thing."   [24:50]  📊 EXEMPLO DE INTELIGÊNCIA VS ESCALA DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Pessoas Menos Inteligentes Ganhando Mais"   NÚMEROS: Ganho diário > ganho mensal de muitos Ganho diário > ganho anual potencial 5 empresas = $2 million valor separado Bundle = $5 million valor combinado $2 million = comissão na venda   VISUAL:  Comparação entre habilidade técnica e escolha de jogo, modelo de consolidação e venda de negócios, arbitragem de valor através de escala   [24:55]  "You know, to be honest, there's I know someone dumber than all of you who could not do jack [shit] with computers. They couldn't run an ad to save their life, but they probably make in a day what you make in a month. They might even make in a day what you make in a year. And they're dumber than you for sure. They're dumber than you. I know them. They're idiots."   [25:20]  "But they're playing with what they do is all they do is they go and they meet with different businesses. They introduce each other. They merge the company and they sell it. And so these five companies might be dry cleaners, whatever, right? Five of them together might be worth two million, but because he bundled them up all up together and it's almost a monopoly now, now he sells it for five million. He takes a $2 million check or whatever, right?"   [25:50]  📊 MODELO JEREMY DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Estrutura de Rev Share de Alto Valor"   NÚMEROS: $100,000/mês mínimo = threshold de clientes Rev share = modelo de pricing   VISUAL:  Modelo de negócio baseado em resultados, seleção de clientes por potencial de revenue, estrutura de participação   [25:55]  "So, it's just the the the those level levels up of the game, right? And when you continue to level up and improve in the game, um the numbers get bigger, right? And the math gets bigger. Even with what Jeremy's doing now, Jeremy is charging these rev shares and you know, he's not going to take on a client unless he makes at least $100,000, right, a month on that deal."   [26:20]  📊 PRINCÍPIO DE PERSISTÊNCIA DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Stay in the Game Long Enough"   NÚMEROS: 10 anos = tempo de aprendizado mencionado $10K/mês profit = ponto inicial (2017-2018) $100K/mês = 2019 $1M/mês = 18 meses depois $10M/mês = meta atual   VISUAL:  Timeline de progressão ao longo de década, acumulação de conhecimento e entendimento, curva de aprendizado exponencial   [26:25]  "So, those are the kind of things that, you know, I would uh urge you guys to think about. Um, I mean that's just honestly that's like 10 years of life of of trying to make money online and and and learn. So honestly, I would say if you stay in the game and you keep pushing yourself for as long as possible, eventually you're just going to hit it big."   [26:50]  "You know what I'm saying? Like you just will if you stay in the game long enough and you keep getting better and you keep learning more and you keep understanding, oh, okay, that's how this works, that's how that works."   [27:05]  📊 LIÇÃO DE ADVERSIDADE DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Roubo de $1 Million Vira Oportunidade"   NÚMEROS: $1 million = valor roubado em crypto $6 million = mint que acabara de fazer $1 million/mês profit = potencial do VC firm criado   VISUAL:  Transformação de problema em oportunidade, criação de VC firm próprio, modelo de deal flow para comunidade   [27:10]  "Um, I will say what's going to make us even more money is we actually right after we made six million on our mint, we had somebody steal a million dollars from us, uh, liquid in crypto. So, we ain't getting that [shit] back. Uh, and, um, that taught us a lot because it was it was a firm that we trusted a lot that we thought were going to help us do a lot of things and we ended up making our own V crypto VC firm."   [27:40]  "So, now we own our own VC firm. So, I mean, we'll we'll off that alone, we'll probably make another million a month in profit because now we're just tossing up deals to our community and they buy everything."   [27:55]  📊 FILOSOFIA DE ADVERSIDADE DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Problemas Como Catalisadores"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente   VISUAL:  Transformação de obstáculos em benefícios, aprendizado através de dor, evolução forçada por adversidade   [28:00]  "Um, so your problems and hurdles and mistakes eventually end up benefiting you more, but you will get kicked in the nuts really, really hard."   [28:10]  📊 TIMELINE DE CRESCIMENTO COMPLETA DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Jornada Completa 2017-2024"   NÚMEROS: 2017-2018: $10K/mês profit (produto físico) 2019: $100K/mês (entrada no Inner Circle) 18 meses depois: $1M/mês Março 2023: $6M/mês Atual: $1.5-2M/mês Meta 2024: $10M/mês   VISUAL:  Progressão ao longo de 7 anos, múltiplas iterações de negócio, aprendizado acumulativo, curva de crescimento não-linear   [28:15]  "Um, and in terms of getting to the point where we can make this kind of money, honestly, it's just being in the game. You know, when Jeremy met me, when he when I first met Jeremy, I was making like 10 grand a month in profit and I was selling that physical product that he was talking about. And then that was like in 2017, 2018."   [28:40]  "Then in 2019, I was making 100 grand a month and I came to the inner circle. Then I I met Jeremy and I was like, 'Dude, I want to make a million a month.' And then like I 18 months later, we made a million a month and now we're trying to get to 10 million and you know, so on and so forth."   [29:00]  📊 FRAMEWORK DE MAESTRIA DETECTADO ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Componentes do Sucesso em Negócios"   NÚMEROS:  Não especificados numericamente   VISUAL:  Sistema integrado: criação de oferta → marketing → messaging → conversão → entrega, entendimento holístico do processo   [29:05]  "But if we didn't do all that learning and training and understanding eventually you just click you're like oh okay so like that's how you create an offer this is how you market the product this is how you do the messaging this is how you do the conversion this is how you deliver right and so on and so forth so it's just time you know"   [29:25]  "[Outras perguntas da audiência]"   [29:30]  📊 DESCOBERTA DE CRYPTO MINING DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Como Descobriu Crypto Mining"   NÚMEROS: $100 million = portfolio imobiliário do pai $5-10K inicial = investimento em options Multi-seven figures = resultado Abaixo de $3/share = preço de compra RIOT/MARA Acima de $80/share = preço de venda 200x = multiplicador no option play $20K/dia = ganho durante 2 meses   VISUAL:  Jornada de descoberta através de investimentos, background familiar em real estate, busca por ativos com melhor retorno que imóveis   [29:35]  "yeah. So, a lot of research, a lot of research, a lot of understanding, a lot of of making mistakes and winning and losing. I've always I've always um had my eye on on, you know, different types of assets. My dad runs a $100 million real estate portfolio where uh my brother and I put a majority of our real estate capital. So, any real estate we we put towards his fund."   [30:00]  "Um, and he builds assisted living complexes and neighborhoods and things like that. Um, and so I was always looking for things that are more like they can produce a better return than real estate. Maybe not as stable, but they're they're reliable."   [30:20]  "And dude, so one of the biggest wins I had in 2021 was I turned Hust and I turned like 510 grand into like multi-se figures with uh options. We bought Riot and Mar options. When Riot and Mar Ride and Mara are crypto mining companies, we bought them. We bought options on them when they were under $3 a share and we sold our options when Ride and Maro were above $80 a share."   [30:50]  "So we we literally got like a 200x or some [shit] on that on that option play. You remember that? That was like we were making like 20k a day. Like you just look at your phone and it's up 20k every day for like two months."   [31:05]  📊 TESE DE INVESTIMENTO DETECTADA ─────────────────────────────  TEXTO:  "Visão de Longo Prazo - Crypto Mining"   NÚMEROS: 4.5-5%/mês = retorno para clientes de mining   VISUAL:  Posicionamento como bancos do futuro, processadores de transação da nova economia, competidor do ouro   [31:10]  "Um and uh so that's where I realized crypto mining is like a serious serious game, you know. Um, and to be honest, these crypto mining firms, as long as crypto and Bitcoin goes where we believe it will, um, which is I think it's it's honestly going to be a much larger competitor to gold than a lot of people think, dude, it's we're going to become the banks of the future."   [31:35]  "Like, we're literally the credit card transaction processors of the new economy, you know? Um, so right now our our crypto mining uh clients are earning like four and a half, 5% a month. And I mean, you know, obviously if you can do that, then you know, people will throw whatever, you know, money they have at you. Um, so yeah."   [31:55]  "[Mais perguntas e fechamento]"   [32:00]  "Yeah. Go ahead. Yeah, sure. Sure. Of course. I'll take care of you guys. Um, but any other questions, guys?"   [32:10]  "Thank you guys. And thank you, Jeremy, as always. Seriously, man. Honestly, I I I really want to let you know, dude. like we never would have gotten to this level without you. So, uh just know, man. You know, you're a big reason for it and I'm grateful for you always."   [32:30]  "Congratulations. Thank you. All right, cool. We're going to take a quick networking break. Look, it's 2:50 right now. We're..."     📊 RESUMO EXECUTIVO   NÚMEROS PRINCIPAIS: $6.7 million  em um mês (Março 2023) - arredondado para $6M $5 million  do NFT mint principal $1 million  de runoff em Abril $1.5-2 million/mês  - operação atual $10 million/mês  - meta para 2024 $4 million  - investimento em infraestrutura de crypto mining $900K-1.2M/mês  - revenue atual de crypto mining $40 million  - capital já alocado (deals de $10M + $30M) $1 million  - roubado por firma de confiança 80x  - crescimento da coleção NFT inicial 250K  - valor da coleção inicial 4,000 pessoas  - audiência do lançamento Top 25  - ranking mundial de empresas NFT 4.5-5%/mês  - retorno para clientes de mining 200x  - retorno em options de RIOT/MARA $100,000 AP  - relógio comprado após o $6M $100K/mês  - mínimo de Jeremy para clientes 5 dimensões  - Five-Pointed Star of Success 2x/semana  - calls de liderança (Segunda e Quarta) 1 hora  - duração das calls de treinamento   TIMELINE DE CRESCIMENTO: 2017-2018: $10K/mês (produto físico - eye sling) 2019: $100K/mês (entrada Inner Circle) +18 meses: $1M/mês Março 2023: $6M/mês (pico) 2024: $1.5-2M/mês atual → meta $10M/mês   ESTRATÉGIAS E SISTEMAS:   Modelo de Negócio Dual: Web3 (Steady Stack NFT): royalties recorrentes Web2 (Crypto Mining): deployment de capital institucional   Estratégia de NFT: Fase 1: Coleção pequena (250K) para prova de conceito Demonstrar 80x de crescimento em bear market Fase 2: Mint maior ($5M) com credibilidade estabelecida Conversão de programa Web2 em ativo Web3   Sistema de Crypto Mining: Investimento inicial de $4M em infraestrutura Silêncio estratégico em 2023 para vantagem competitiva Deals institucionais de $10M e $30M Retorno de 4.5-5%/mês para clientes Warehouse spaces + infraestrutura elétrica + relações diplomáticas   Estratégia de Capital: Reinvestimento em ativos empresariais (não gastos pessoais) Compra de infraestrutura física Desenvolvimento de relacionamentos institucionais Timing de recompensas pessoais (AP após $6M)   Sistema de Liderança: 2 calls/semana (Segunda e Quarta) 1 hora de duração Inclusão de time + contractors + clientes Foco em upgrade de mentalidade Investimento em desenvolvimento de pessoas   Rotina de Alta Performance: Acordar 6-7 AM (mudança de hábito) Journaling + meditação + oração Trabalho profundo matinal Treino físico Educação contínua (podcasts, audiobooks, leitura) Programação mental intencional   Framework "Five-Pointed Star": Físico Mental Emocional Espiritual Financeiro/Caráter   Estratégia de Entrada em Mercados: Identificar espaços nascentes (95% falha) Combinar conhecimento técnico + business acumen Executar onde nerds técnicos falham em negócios Criar valor real + tecnologia   Modelo de Wholesaling/Facilitação: Lucro no movimento de capital Consolidação de empresas (5 × $2M → venda $5M) Arbitragem de valor através de escala   Network Strategy: Parcerias com Kraken, Binance, Coinbase Relacionamento com market makers de BTC/ETH Forbes Web3 Advisors Top 50 Web3 Entrepreneurs (Forbes)   ESTRUTURA:   Princípios Fundamentais: "You're either growing or dying" - não existe estagnação "Want things to change → change things in your life" "Same time to make $1B as $1M" - diferença está no jogo escolhido "$6M ain't shit" - perspectiva de escala real "Stay in the game long enough" - persistência + aprendizado "Problems become catalysts" - adversidade gera oportunidade   Hierarquia de Negócios: Abaixo $40M = small business $40M+ = além de small business Bilhões = real estate comercial "Levels to this shit" - consciência de escala   Sistema de Upgrade: Internet Marketing → Software (Becker) Internet Marketing → Portfolio + Exit (Hormozi) Internet Marketing → E-commerce Funds (Tai Lopez) Physical Products → Crypto/NFT → Mining (Zan)   Transformações de Adversidade: $1M roubado → criação de VC firm próprio $1M/mês adicional de profit potencial Deal flow para comunidade   DADOS FINANCEIROS:   Revenue Breakdown Março 2023: NFT Mint: $5M Runoff Abril: $1M Total: $6M+   Operação Atual: Web3: centenas de milhares/mês Crypto Mining: $900K-1.2M/mês Total: $1.5-2M/mês   Capital Deployments: Infraestrutura Mining: $4M investido Deal 1: $10M ($1M/mês deployment) Deal 2: $30M Total Alocado: $40M   ROI Cases: RIOT/MARA Options: 200x (de <$3 para >$80/share) NFT Initial: 80x em bear market Crypto Mining Clients: 4.5-5%/mês   Comparações de Mercado: Real Estate Comercial: $400M-1.2B por propriedade Cash Flow Prédio: $40M/mês Internet Marketers: estagnados em $20-30M Mining Públicas: bilhões em valuation   Personal Investments: AP Watch: $100K (pós $6M) Real Estate: através do fund do pai ($100M portfolio) Options Play: $5-10K → multi-seven figures     DURAÇÃO:  ~32 minutos FORMATO:  Apresentação de troféu + Q&A ao vivo no Inner Circle, entrevista informal com audiência presente
